title: 山中问答
titleEn: Questions and Answers in the Mountains
author: 李白
content:
问余何意栖碧山
笑而不答心自闲
桃花流水窅然去
别有天地非人间
translation:
You ask why I dwell in the green mountains
I smile and don't answer — my heart is at ease
Peach blossoms and flowing water, deep and distant
Another heaven and earth, not the human world
annotation: Someone asks Li Bai why he lives in the mountains. He just smiles. How do you explain peace to someone who's never felt it? The peach blossoms know.

title: 玉阶怨
author: 李白
content:
玉阶生白露
夜久侵罗袜
却下水晶帘
玲珑望秋月
translation:
Jade steps grow white dew
Late night, it soaks her silk socks
She lowers the crystal curtain
Through the translucent screen, she gazes at the autumn moon
annotation: A palace woman waits all night. The dew soaks her socks. She lowers the curtain but still watches the moon. Li Bai never says 'lonely' — he shows it.

title: 金陵酒肆留别
titlePinyin: Jin Ling Jiu Si Liu Bie
titleEn: Farewell at a Jinling Wine Shop
author: 李白
content:
风吹柳花满店香
吴姬压酒唤客尝
金陵子弟来相送
欲行不行各尽觞
请君试问东流水
别意与之谁短长
translation:
Wind blows willow flowers, the shop is full of fragrance
A Wu girl presses wine, calls guests to taste
Jinling youths come to see me off
Wanting to go, not going, we finish our cups
I ask you: try comparing the eastward flowing water
With our parting feelings — which is shorter, which longer?
annotation: A farewell party in Nanjing. Everyone's drinking, no one wants to leave. Li Bai asks: is the river longer than our goodbye? Nothing is longer than parting.

title: 黄鹤楼
author: 崔颢
content:
昔人已乘黄鹤去
此地空余黄鹤楼
黄鹤一去不复返
白云千载空悠悠
晴川历历汉阳树
芳草萋萋鹦鹉洲
日暮乡关何处是
烟波江上使人愁
translation:
The ancient one already rode the yellow crane away
Here, only the Yellow Crane Tower remains
The yellow crane left and never returned
White clouds for a thousand years, empty, drifting
Clear river, distinct, the trees of Hanyang
Fragrant grass, thick, the Parrot Island
At dusk, where is the homeland?
Mist and waves on the river make one sorrowful
annotation: Li Bai said this poem was so good he couldn't match it. A man climbs a tower looking for a legend. The crane is gone, the clouds drift, the grass grows. Only homesickness remains.

title: 长干行
author: 崔颢
content:
君家何处住
妾住在横塘
停船暂借问
或恐是同乡
translation:
Where do you live?
I live by Hengtang
I stop my boat and ask briefly
Perhaps we're from the same hometown
annotation: A woman stops a stranger's boat: 'Where are you from? I'm from Hengtang — maybe we're neighbors!' The boldness of curiosity, the hope of connection.

title: 凉州词
author: 王之涣
content:
黄河远上白云间
一片孤城万仞山
羌笛何须怨杨柳
春风不度玉门关
translation:
The Yellow River rises far among white clouds
A lone city among mountains ten thousand feet
Why must the Qiang flute complain of willows?
Spring wind never passes Jade Gate Pass
annotation: At the edge of the empire, soldiers hear a flute and think of home. Beyond Jade Gate, even spring cannot reach. A poem about the loneliness of the frontier.

title: 闺怨
author: 王昌龄
content:
闺中少妇不知愁
春日凝妆上翠楼
忽见陌头杨柳色
悔教夫婿觅封侯
translation:
A young wife in her boudoir doesn't know sorrow
On a spring day, she dresses up and climbs the tower
Suddenly she sees the willow colors on the road
And regrets urging her husband to seek a noble title
annotation: She was so proud when her husband went to war for glory. Then she sees the spring willows and realizes: what good is a title if you're alone? The most honest regret.

title: 采莲曲
author: 王昌龄
content:
荷叶罗裙一色裁
芙蓉向脸两边开
乱入池中看不见
闻歌始觉有人来
translation:
Lotus leaves and silk skirts, cut from one color
Hibiscus opens on both sides of their faces
They mix into the pond, invisible
Only when you hear singing do you know someone's there
annotation: Girls picking lotus flowers blend into the pond. Their dresses are the same green as the leaves, their faces the same pink as the flowers. You only know they're there when they sing.

title: 十五夜望月
titleEn: Watching the Moon on the Fifteenth Night
author: 王建
content:
中庭地白树栖鸦
冷露无声湿桂花
今夜月明人尽望
不知秋思落谁家
translation:
In the courtyard, the ground is white, crows roost in trees
Cold dew, silent, dampens the osmanthus
Tonight the moon is bright, everyone looks
I know not whose home the autumn thoughts fall on
annotation: A full moon night. Everyone is looking up. But whose home does the longing land in? Wang Jian asks the question everyone feels but no one says.

title: 新嫁娘词
author: 王建
content:
三日入厨下
洗手作羹汤
未谙姑食性
先遣小姑尝
translation:
Three days after marriage, she enters the kitchen
Washes her hands and makes soup
Not yet knowing her mother-in-law's taste
She first has the sister-in-law taste it
annotation: A new bride navigates her new family. She doesn't know what her mother-in-law likes, so she tests it on the sister-in-law first. A tiny poem about the politics of fitting in.

title: 雨过山村
titleEn: After Rain in a Mountain Village
author: 王建
content:
雨里鸡鸣一两家
竹溪村路板桥斜
妇姑相唤浴蚕去
闲着中庭栀子花
translation:
In the rain, one or two households' roosters crow
Bamboo stream, village road, a slanting plank bridge
Women call each other to bathe the silkworms
Idle in the courtyard: gardenia flowers
annotation: After rain, a quiet village. Women call each other to work. The gardenia flowers are the only ones with nothing to do.王建 finds beauty in the ordinary.

title: 望夫石
author: 王建
content:
望夫处
江悠悠
化为石
不回头
translation:
Where she watches for her husband
The river flows endlessly
She turned to stone
And never looked back
annotation: A woman waited so long for her husband that she became a stone. Four lines, one legend.王建 tells an eternal story in the fewest possible words.

title: 节妇吟
author: 张籍
content:
君知妾有夫
赠妾双明珠
感君缠绵意
系在红罗襦
妾家高楼连苑起
良人执戟明光里
知君用心如日月
事夫誓拟同生死
还君明珠双泪垂
恨不相逢未嫁时
translation:
You know I have a husband
Yet you gave me a pair of bright pearls
Moved by your tender feelings
I tied them to my red silk jacket
My home's high tower connects to the palace garden
My husband carries a halberd in the Bright Light Hall
I know your heart is like the sun and moon
But I swore to live and die with my husband
I return your pearls with tears falling
I regret we didn't meet before I was married
annotation: A married woman receives a love gift. She's moved but returns it with tears. 'I regret we didn't meet before I was married.' The most graceful rejection in poetry.

title: 野老歌
author: 张籍
content:
老农家贫在山住
耕种山田三四亩
苗疏税多不得食
输入官仓化为土
岁暮锄犁傍空室
呼儿登山收橡实
西江贾客珠百斛
船中养犬长食肉
translation:
An old farmer, poor, lives in the mountains
Cultivates three or four acres of mountain fields
The seedlings are sparse, taxes are many, he can't eat
What's delivered to the government granary turns to dust
At year's end, hoe and plow lean against an empty room
He tells his son to climb the mountain and gather acorns
Merchants on the western river have pearls by the bushel
Dogs on their boats eat meat every day
annotation: A farmer works all year and eats acorns. Merchants' dogs eat meat. Zhang籍 doesn't comment — he just shows the contrast. The facts are the protest.

title: 秋思
author: 张籍
content:
洛阳城里见秋风
欲作家书意万重
复恐匆匆说不尽
行人临发又开封
translation:
In Luoyang city, I feel the autumn wind
I want to write a letter home, my thoughts weigh ten thousand pounds
Again I fear I've said everything too hastily
As the messenger is about to leave, I reopen the envelope
annotation: He writes a letter home. Seals it. Reopens it. What if he forgot something? This is the universal experience of trying to say everything in one letter.

title: 成都曲
author: 张籍
content:
锦江近西烟水绿
新雨山头荔枝熟
万里桥边多酒家
游人爱向谁家宿
translation:
Jin River, west side, misty water green
After fresh rain, mountain top, lychees ripen
By the Ten Thousand Li Bridge, many wine houses
Travelers — which house do you love to stay at?
annotation: Chengdu in summer: green river, ripe lychees, wine houses everywhere. Zhang籍 makes you want to visit. 'Which house do you love?' — he's asking the reader.

title: 夜到渔家
titleEn: Arriving at a Fisherman's Home at Night
author: 张籍
content:
渔家在江口
潮水入柴扉
行客欲投宿
主人犹未归
translation:
The fisherman's home is at the river mouth
Tide water enters the brush gate
A traveler wants to find shelter
The host still hasn't returned
annotation: A traveler arrives at a fisherman's hut. The tide is coming in, the door is open, but no one's home. Four lines, a whole story of waiting.

title: 雪诗
author: 张孜
content:
长安大雪天
鸟雀难相觅
其中豪贵家
捣椒泥四壁
到处爇红炉
周回下罗帏
暖手调金丝
蘸甲斟琼液
醉唱玉尘飞
困融香汗滴
translation:
Chang'an, a heavy snow day
Birds can barely find each other
In the homes of the rich
They grind pepper and plaster the walls
Everywhere, red stoves burn
Around them, silk curtains hang
Warm hands tune golden strings
Dipping fingers, they pour jade wine
Drunk, they sing of flying jade snow
Drowsy, melting, fragrant sweat drips
annotation: While the poor freeze, the rich grind pepper for their walls and drink warm wine. Zhang孜's satire: the snow is beautiful if you're inside.

title: 焚书坑
author: 章碣
content:
竹帛烟销帝业虚
关河空锁祖龙居
坑灰未冷山东乱
刘项原来不读书
translation:
Bamboo and silk burned to smoke, the empire's foundation hollow
Passes and rivers lock in vain the First Dragon's dwelling
The pit's ashes aren't yet cold — Shandong rebels
Liu and Yuan originally didn't read books
annotation: Qin Shi Huang burned books to control thought. But the rebels who overthrew him? They didn't read books either. Zhang Jie's irony: censorship never works.

title: 春闺思
author: 张仲素
content:
袅袅城边柳
青青陌上桑
提笼忘采叶
昨夜梦渔阳
translation:
Graceful, graceful, willows by the city wall
Green, green, mulberry on the road
She carries a basket but forgets to pick leaves
Last night she dreamed of Yuyang
annotation: A woman picks mulberry leaves but forgets what she's doing. She dreamed of her husband at the frontier. The willows and mulberry are just background to her longing.

title: 秋闺思
author: 张仲素
content:
碧窗斜月蔼深晖
愁听寒螀泪湿衣
梦里分明见关塞
不知何路向金微
translation:
Jade window, slanting moon, deep glow
Sorrowfully listening to cold crickets, tears wet my clothes
In the dream, I clearly see the passes and forts
But I don't know which road leads to Jinwei
annotation: She dreams of finding her husband at the frontier. But even in the dream, she can't find the way. The cruelest distance: when even dreams can't bridge it.

title: 塞下曲
author: 许浑
content:
夜战桑乾北
秦兵半不归
朝来有乡信
犹自寄寒衣
translation:
Night battle north of Sanggan
Half the Qin soldiers don't return
In the morning, a letter from home
Still sending winter clothes
annotation: Half the soldiers died last night. In the morning, a letter arrives with winter clothes. The clothes will never be worn. Xu Hun's most devastating poem — the delay of news is the cruelty.

title: 咸阳城东楼
author: 许浑
content:
一上高城万里愁
蒹葭杨柳似汀洲
溪云初起日沉阁
山雨欲来风满楼
鸟下绿芜秦苑夕
蝉鸣黄叶汉宫秋
行人莫问当年事
故国东来渭水流
translation:
Once I climb the high city wall, ten thousand miles of sorrow
Reeds and willows like Tingzhou
Stream clouds first rise, the sun sinks behind the pavilion
Mountain rain is about to come, wind fills the tower
Birds descend on green weeds, Qin garden at dusk
Cicadas sing in yellow leaves, Han palace in autumn
Travelers, don't ask about the past
The old kingdom — east comes the Wei River flowing
annotation: 'Mountain rain is about to come, wind fills the tower' — this line became a Chinese idiom for 'the calm before the storm.' Xu Hun sees history's weight in every cloud.

title: 金陵怀古
author: 许浑
content:
玉树歌残王气终
景阳兵合戍楼空
松楸远近千官冢
禾黍高低六代宫
石燕拂云晴亦雨
江豚吹浪夜还风
英雄一去豪华尽
惟有青山似洛中
translation:
The jade tree song ends, the royal aura fades
Jingyang soldiers gather, the watchtower empties
Pines and catalpas near and far, a thousand officials' tombs
Millet and sorghum high and low, six dynasties' palaces
Stone birds brush the clouds, rain even on clear days
River porpoises blow waves, wind even at night
Once the heroes leave, all luxury ends
Only the green mountains are like Luoyang
annotation: Six dynasties rose and fell in Nanjing. Now only tombs and weeds remain. Xu Hun's message: empires end, mountains stay.

title: 途经秦始皇墓
titlePinyin: Tu Jing Qin Shi Huang Mu
titleEn: Passing by Qin Shi Huang's Tomb
author: 许浑
content:
龙盘虎踞树层层
势入浮云亦是崩
一种青山秋草里
路人唯拜汉文陵
translation:
Dragon coiling, tiger crouching, layers of trees
Its momentum enters the clouds — yet it still collapsed
Among the same green mountains and autumn grass
Travelers only bow to Emperor Wen of Han's tomb
annotation: Qin Shi Huang's tomb is grand but forgotten. People bow to the humble tomb of Emperor Wen instead. Xu Hun's verdict: kindness outlasts power.
